title: Case Plugin
description: A Minecraft chest plugin, perfect for CityBuilds or other servers where chests are needed.
body:
A Minecraft Case Plugin, with different open animations for you Server

Commands:

/case create <name> <block> 
/case delete <name>
/case edit <name> <page count>
/case give <name> <case | key > <case-name> <number>
/case givereward <name> <case-name> <slot> <rarity>
/case open <name> <case>
/case openstyle <style>
/case reloadconfig <case-name>
/case removelocation <case-name>
/case resetpullcount <case-name> confirm
/case setlocation <case-name>
/case setenable <case-name> <true|false>

**Ingame Editor:**

- Rightklick Items to Edit the rarity, Wincommand and much more.
- to save the case press the Emerald in the EditMenu or close the Inventory
